title: daphniphyllum himalense subsp. angustifolium
intro: Daphniphyllum himalense subsp. angustifolium, also known as Himalayan daphniphyllum or Tibetan daphniphyllum, is a rare and lesser-known plant species belonging to the family Daphniphyllaceae. It is an evergreen shrub native to the Himalayas, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, due to its rich content of flavonoids and alkaloids. Daphniphyllum himalense subsp. angustifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
